pages.title: The Modifier Tome
pages.text: The $(item)Modifier Tome$() is the Arsenal's upgrade ledger. Right-click it on a stasis tool and a bound modifier crystal to apply the modifier to the tool. Each tool has a finite number of modifier slots broken into four tracks.

pages.title: The four tracks
pages.text: $(bold)Head$() — affects the striking surface: sharpness, reach, harvest behavior.$(br)$(bold)Core$() — affects the tool's body: durability multipliers, soul-network draw, item-handling quirks.$(br)$(bold)Handle$() — affects the wielder's side: attack speed, knockback, haste.$(br)$(bold)Ability$() — active or triggered effects: AOE sweeps, launches, area breaks.

pages.title: Porting note
pages.text: The 1.12 Arsenal shipped sixteen real modifiers and seven placeholder class stubs that never held logic. Only the sixteen functional modifiers made the jump to this version; the empty stubs were dropped. If you remember a 1.12 guide mentioning $(italic)Area$(), $(italic)BOD$(), $(italic)DOD$(), $(italic)Free Flowing$(), $(italic)Piercing$(), $(italic)Shield$(), or $(italic)Teleportation$() — those were scaffolds the original author never finished, not something lost in port.
